title: Junior Business Development Manager at CREDAI

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at CREDAI
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
